artworks.title: Soft Morning Hills
artworks.description: Gentle rolling hills in transparent watercolor, capturing the pale light of early morning.

artworks.title: Riverbend Dusk
artworks.description: A bend in the river at blue hour with layered acrylic glazes and soft reflections.

artworks.title: After Rain Meadows
artworks.description: Soft pastel washes describe a meadow shimmering after a summer rainstorm.

artworks.title: Cliffside Light
artworks.description: Impasto strokes catch the last rays of light on a rugged coastline.

artworks.title: Highland Storm
artworks.description: A dramatic monochrome interpretation of storm clouds rolling over distant hills.

artworks.title: Pocket Sky Study
artworks.description: A tiny cloudscape rendered in layered pencil and gouache in candy-soft tones.

artworks.title: Soft Rooftops
artworks.description: A quiet block of city rooftops softened into pastel shapes at sunrise.

artworks.title: Peaches on Linen
artworks.description: Delicate peaches arranged on a folded linen cloth, painted in soft acrylic layers.

artworks.title: Pastel Dreamscape
artworks.description: A digital collage of hazy horizon lines and gradients reminiscent of distant memories.

artworks.title: Midnight Arches
artworks.description: A glowing underpass at night with streaks of car lights and neon signage.

artworks.title: Twilight Overpass
artworks.description: Layered ink and collage capturing an overpass just as streetlights flicker on.

artworks.title: Spring Rain on 5th
artworks.description: Tall vertical study of a rainy avenue, with reflections stretching down the pavement.

artworks.title: Portrait in Window Light
artworks.description: A contemplative bust portrait turned toward a bright window, with soft edges and muted tones.

artworks.title: Figure Study in Motion
artworks.description: Loose ink lines capture a dancer mid-turn in a single continuous gesture.

artworks.title: Citrus Bowl
artworks.description: A bright bowl of oranges and lemons rendered in bold, simplified shapes.

artworks.title: Neon Grid
artworks.description: A glowing lattice of neon lines over textured paint and collage fragments.

artworks.title: City Mural Concept
artworks.description: Digital concept artwork for a large-scale city mural, not available for sale.

documents.title: 2024 Portfolio Lookbook
documents.description: A curated selection of 2022–2024 paintings, cityscapes, and murals in a downloadable PDF lookbook.

documents.title: 2023 Portfolio Lookbook
documents.description: Archived 2023 lookbook featuring earlier landscape and figure works.

documents.title: Press Kit 2025
documents.description: Press-ready artist bio, statements, and selected images for 2025 exhibitions.

documents.title: Artist CV 2026
documents.description: Comprehensive curriculum vitae including exhibitions, residencies, and commissions up to 2026.

exhibitions.title: Summer Light: New Landscapes
exhibitions.description_short: A solo exhibition of recent landscape paintings exploring shifting summer light.
exhibitions.description_long: Summer Light: New Landscapes brings together over twenty recent plein-air and studio landscapes created between 2022 and 2024. The exhibition traces subtle shifts in palette and composition as the artist follows the changing light along rivers, fields, and hillsides.

exhibitions.title: Small Works Salon
exhibitions.description_short: A curated group show of small-format pieces under 40 cm.
exhibitions.description_long: Atelier West’s annual Small Works Salon features compact paintings, drawings, and prints by over thirty artists. The show highlights the intimacy of small-scale work, including several of the artist’s pastel studies and miniature cityscapes.

exhibitions.title: Autumn City Glow
exhibitions.description_short: New cityscapes tracing the rhythms of dusk and dawn.
exhibitions.description_long: Autumn City Glow presents a series of large-format cityscapes painted on the cusp of night and day. Layered reflections, wet streets, and silhouetted architecture explore how cities transform under changing light.

exhibitions.title: Edges of Quiet
exhibitions.description_short: A solo show of portraits and figures in contemplative spaces.
exhibitions.description_long: Edges of Quiet gathers intimate portraits and figure studies situated on thresholds: doorways, windowsills, and stairwells. The works examine how posture and light communicate interior states.

exhibitions.title: Canal Residency Open Studios
exhibitions.description_short: Planned open studios for the Canal Arts residency program.
exhibitions.description_long: This weekend of open studios was scheduled to conclude the Canal Arts residency, with in-progress murals and cityscape studies on view. The event was cancelled due to unforeseen circumstances.

exhibitions.title: Winter Group Show
exhibitions.description_short: A winter group exhibition of contemporary painters.
exhibitions.description_long: Stonebridge Gallery’s Winter Group Show features a diverse roster of contemporary painters, including several of the artist’s abstract works that focus on geometry and light.

exhibitions.title: Night Walks (Online Release)
exhibitions.description_short: An online release of limited edition cityscape prints.
exhibitions.description_long: Night Walks is a web-based exhibition and print release of nocturnal cityscapes. Collectors can explore each piece in detail and purchase limited edition prints directly through the site.

exhibitions.title: Lines of Light: Mid-Career Retrospective
exhibitions.description_short: A museum retrospective tracing fifteen years of practice.
exhibitions.description_long: Lines of Light surveys the artist’s development from early plein-air landscapes to large-scale city murals and abstract works. The show includes sketches, process materials, and several newly commissioned pieces.

exhibitions.title: Spring Art Fair 2026
exhibitions.description_short: Participation in the Spring Art Fair with new cityscape prints.
exhibitions.description_long: At the 2026 Spring Art Fair, the artist presented a focused selection of large-format cityscape prints, highlighting recent explorations in layered reflections and atmospheric light.

exhibitions.title: City Walls Mural Walk
exhibitions.description_short: A guided walking tour of recent murals, including two café commissions.
exhibitions.description_long: The City Walls Mural Walk introduces visitors to recent large-scale works across the downtown core, with the artist speaking about process, materials, and collaborating with local businesses.

exhibitions.title: Spring Open Studio
exhibitions.description_short: An ongoing open studio period with rotating works on the walls.
exhibitions.description_long: During the Spring Open Studio, visitors are invited to drop by the artist’s workspace to see works in progress, browse available originals, and preview pieces headed to upcoming exhibitions.

exhibitions.title: City Lights Collective
exhibitions.description_short: Group exhibition of contemporary urban painters.
exhibitions.description_long: City Lights Collective brought together ten painters who focus on urban environments, from intimate alleyways to sweeping skyline views.

exhibitions.title: Riverbank Residency Showcase
exhibitions.description_short: Showcase of works produced during the Riverbank summer residency.
exhibitions.description_long: The residency showcase featured sketchbooks, plein-air studies, and several larger canvases completed during a month along the river.

exhibitions.title: Soft Edges: Pastel Works on Paper
exhibitions.description_short: An upcoming group show centered on pastel palettes and delicate mark-making.
exhibitions.description_long: Soft Edges will feature small-scale works on paper that explore quiet color harmonies and atmospheric effects. The artist will contribute several new pastel studies and small cityscapes.

projects.title: LumenTech HQ Lobby Mural
projects.description_short: A luminous abstract cityscape mural for a technology company lobby.
projects.description_long: Commissioned by LumenTech Systems for their headquarters lobby, this 6-meter mural uses layered geometry and gradients to echo circuit diagrams and city grids. The mural anchors the reception area and is visible from the street, acting as both artwork and wayfinding.

projects.title: Blossom Bakery Exterior Mural
projects.description_short: A cheerful pastel façade mural for a neighborhood bakery.
projects.description_long: This street-facing mural wraps around the corner of Blossom Bakery, featuring stylized flowers, breads, and coffee motifs in a pastel palette. The design invites passersby into the space and has become a popular photo backdrop.

projects.title: Greenleaf Café Interior Mural
projects.description_short: A calming botanical mural for a plant-filled café.
projects.description_long: Greenleaf Café commissioned an interior mural that blends abstract leaf forms with hints of city skylines. The 4.5-meter wall sits opposite the main counter, creating a lush backdrop for guests and events.

projects.title: Storybook Nursery Mural
projects.description_short: A whimsical sky and forest scene for a child’s bedroom.
projects.description_long: This residential mural spans two walls and features gentle mountains, trees, and animals in a muted pastel palette. The design was tailored to grow with the child, avoiding overly literal cartoon characters.

projects.title: Community Center Courtyard Mural
projects.description_short: A collaborative mural created with local youth.
projects.description_long: Working with a group of teens, the artist facilitated workshops to co-design a courtyard mural that reflects neighborhood stories. The final piece incorporates hand-drawn elements from participants into a cohesive urban landscape.

projects.title: Metro Underpass Light Corridor
projects.description_short: A large-scale underpass mural improving a once-dark pedestrian route.
projects.description_long: The Metro Underpass Light Corridor spans over 40 meters of wall, using gradients and reflective paints to brighten a high-traffic pedestrian tunnel near the central station.

projects.title: Harbor Roasters Brand Illustration Suite
projects.description_short: A set of illustrations for coffee packaging and in-store graphics.
projects.description_long: For Harbor Roasters’ brand refresh, the artist created a suite of illustrations inspired by harbors, waves, and night skylines. The artwork appears on packaging, signage, and social media.

projects.title: Night Drives Album Cover
projects.description_short: Cover and interior artwork for an indie band’s vinyl release.
projects.description_long: Initially a self-initiated cityscape, this piece was later licensed and expanded into a full suite of visuals for The Floodlights’ album Night Drives, including cover, liner, and poster art.

projects.title: Skyline Panels Airport Installation
projects.description_short: A series of suspended panels depicting local skylines in abstract form.
projects.description_long: Commissioned for the arrivals hall, this installation uses layered acrylic panels printed with abstracted city skylines. The panels shift in color as visitors move through the space.

projects.title: Underpass Study Wall
projects.description_short: A self-initiated experimental mural beneath a disused rail line.
projects.description_long: Created independently with city permission, this underpass mural served as a testing ground for new spray techniques, reflective paints, and projection-based sketching.

projects.title: Art Hotel Wayfinding Icons
projects.description_short: A custom set of pictograms and mini murals for an art hotel.
projects.description_long: For Harborline Art Hotel, the artist designed wayfinding pictograms and small wall panels that guide guests while echoing the building’s larger murals and color story.

projects.title: Color Field Charity Pop-up
projects.description_short: A modular installation of painted panels for a weekend fundraiser.
projects.description_long: Working with Arts for All, the artist created a modular installation of colorful panels that could be rearranged throughout the event space, later sold individually to support arts education.

projects.title: Concept Studies for Hotel Lobby Mural
projects.description_short: In-progress concept sketches for a large hotel lobby mural.
projects.description_long: Early-stage digital mockups and color studies exploring how to integrate a panoramic mural into a multi-story hotel lobby. The project is currently in the design phase.
